languages.text: Силы рода Гапрак должны были прибыть на помощь Даргонусу, однако подкрепление так и не явилось. Необходимо найти любые сведения об их судьбе.

traits.locale_text: Силы рода Гапрак должны были прибыть на помощь Даргонусу, однако подкрепление так и не явилось. Необходимо найти любые сведения об их судьбе.

languages.text: The forces of House Gaprak were expected to come to the aid of Dargonus, yet the reinforcements never arrived. Any information concerning their fate must be found.
languages.original_text: Силы рода Гапрак должны были прибыть на помощь Даргонусу, однако подкрепление так и не явилось. Необходимо найти любые сведения об их судьбе.

traits.locale_text: The forces of House Gaprak were meant to arrive in aid of Dargonus, yet the reinforcements never appeared. Any information concerning their fate must be found.
The forces of House Gaprak were meant to arrive in aid of Dargonus, yet the reinforcements never appeared. Any information concerning their fate must be found.
The forces of House Gaprak were expected to come to the aid of Dargonus, yet the reinforcements never arrived. Any information concerning their fate must be found.
The forces of House Gaprak were expected to come to the aid of Dargonus, yet the reinforcements never arrived. Any information concerning their fate must be found.

languages.text: Die Truppen von Haus Gaprak sollten Dargonus zu Hilfe eilen, sind aber nie eingetroffen. Nun gilt es herauszufinden, was aus ihnen geworden ist.
languages.original_text: The forces of House Gaprak were expected to come to the aid of Dargonus, yet the reinforcements never arrived. Any information concerning their fate must be found.

traits.locale_text: Die Truppen von Haus Gaprak sollten Dargonus zu Hilfe eilen, sind aber nie eingetroffen. Nun gilt es herauszufinden, was aus ihnen geworden ist.

languages.text: Les troupes de la maison Gaprak devaient venir en aide à Dargonus, mais les renforts ne sont jamais arrivés. Il faut obtenir des informations sur ce qu'il est advenu de ces troupes.
languages.original_text: The forces of House Gaprak were expected to come to the aid of Dargonus, yet the reinforcements never arrived. Any information concerning their fate must be found.

traits.locale_text: Les troupes de la maison Gaprak devaient venir en aide à Dargonus, mais les renforts ne sont jamais arrivés. Il faut obtenir des informations sur ce qu'il est advenu de ces troupes.

languages.text: 贾帕克家族的军队本应前来支援达戈努斯，但却始终没有出现。必须找出有关他们下落的线索。
languages.original_text: The forces of House Gaprak were expected to come to the aid of Dargonus, yet the reinforcements never arrived. Any information concerning their fate must be found.

traits.locale_text: 贾帕克家族的军队本应前来支援达戈努斯，但却始终没有出现。必须找出有关他们下落的线索。

languages.text: La casa Gaprak envió tropas en ayuda de Dargonus, pero esos refuerzos nunca llegaron. Debe buscarse cualquier información que revele su destino.
languages.original_text: The forces of House Gaprak were expected to come to the aid of Dargonus, yet the reinforcements never arrived. Any information concerning their fate must be found.

traits.locale_text: La casa Gaprak envió tropas en ayuda de Dargonus, pero esos refuerzos nunca llegaron. Debe buscarse cualquier información que revele su destino.

languages.text: ダーゴナスを助けに来るはずだったガプラック家の部隊だが、援軍は来なかった。彼らの運命を知る手がかりを見つけなければならない。
languages.original_text: A force of the Gaprak family was supposed to come to the aid of Dargonus, but reinforcements never arrived. Any clues to their fate must be found.

languages.text: Gaprak Hanesi güçlerinin Dargonus'un yardımına gelmesi bekleniyordu ancak takviyeler asla gelmedi. Kaderleriyle ilgili herhangi bir bilgi bulunmalı.
languages.original_text: The forces of House Gaprak were expected to come to the aid of Dargonus, yet the reinforcements never arrived. Any information concerning their fate must be found.

traits.locale_text: Gaprak Hanesi güçlerinin Dargonus'un yardımına gelmesi bekleniyordu ancak takviyeler asla gelmedi. Kaderleriyle ilgili herhangi bir bilgi bulunmalı.
